name: PetSaver
problem: Pet care is fragmented—medication tracking and provider search happen across completely separate tools.
solution: Full-stack platform that centralizes medication management and service discovery in one place.
impact: One platform for pet health records, care tracking, and finding trusted providers

name: Business Dashboard
problem: Retail teams track sales, staffing, and operations across disconnected spreadsheets.
solution: Dashboard that consolidates sales performance, staff scheduling, and operations data for faster decisions.
impact: Single view of sales and staffing performance

name: Amblog
problem: Most blogging platforms are either too bare or too bloated for efficient content publishing.
solution: Full-stack publishing platform with dynamic routing, content management, and SEO-optimized rendering.
impact: Clean read/write experience built for performance and scale

name: Chou Bot
problem: Manual moderation and role management is time-consuming and inconsistent.
solution: Scalable automation for moderation, logging, and community engagement.
impact: Automated role assignment, logging, and user engagement
